classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机侧视外形及引线结构，包含尺寸标注'33.35'、'20±1'、'15±0.2'、'Ø5 +0 -0.013'、'4.5±0.1'和铭牌位置，表达机械外形、轴径、轴长及公差尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Used the complete high-confidence reading; overlapping partial OCR readings ocr_006 and ocr_007 were treated as duplicates.
Corrected OCR ∅13 to Φ5 based on the visible diameter callout and combined stacked tolerance +0 and -0.013.

terminology_notes: Φ is normalized as the diameter symbol for shaft diameter callouts.
Stacked tolerance +0 and -0.013 is normalized as +0/-0.013.

dimension_records.reason: Horizontal dimension spans the motor housing/body length in the side view.
Horizontal dimension from shaft tip reference to motor face indicates total shaft protrusion length.

dimension_records.parameter_zh: 端面台阶或安装面偏距
dimension_records.parameter_en: Face step or mounting face offset
dimension_records.reason: Short horizontal dimension near the front face indicates a local offset or step length; exact feature name is inferred from side-view geometry.
Dimension is placed along the shaft feature before the motor face, consistent with the machined flat or shaft feature length.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Diameter 5 mm, upper deviation +0 mm, lower deviation -0.013 mm
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径 5 mm，上偏差 +0 mm，下偏差 -0.013 mm
dimension_records.reason: Vertical diameter callout beside the shaft explicitly specifies Φ5 with unilateral negative tolerance.

dimension_records.parameter_zh: 轴扁位厚度或扁位对边尺寸
dimension_records.parameter_en: Shaft flat thickness or across-flat dimension
dimension_records.reason: Vertical dimension is attached to the shaft profile and likely defines the flat height/across-flat feature; exact shaft feature type is inferred from geometry.

engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft extension is 20±1 mm, shaft feature length is 15±0.2 mm, shaft diameter is Φ5 +0/-0.013 mm, and shaft flat/across-flat dimension is 4.5±0.1 mm.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Motor body side-view length is 33.35 mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector or lead details are visible geometrically but no usable OCR text callout is present in this crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。

text_annotations.correction_note: Merged diameter and tolerance fragments; corrected OCR fragments to the visible diameter callout.
Merged the thread-count callout with the adjacent minimum-depth note; depth symbol was inferred from the visible engineering mark.
Rotated text normalized to reading order.

terminology_notes: Diameter and tolerance fragments were merged only when they formed one visible engineering callout.
Depth-like notation was normalized conservatively from the visible symbol and context.
translation_notes: Kept wire standard text as-is for the English spec.
Converted dimensional tolerances into normalized engineering notation.

dimension_records.reason: Top overall dimension of the housing outline.
Dimension is placed across the upper mounting-hole span and is a functional mounting size.
Combined the diameter symbol, nominal size, and stacked tolerance fragments into one hole-size callout.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。必须同时满足：1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 该裁剪图显示电机'励磁顺序'表，明确给出'顺时针'/'逆时针'方向，以及红A+、红白A-、绿B+、绿白B-等线色与相位接线对应关系，属于接线/针脚定义信息，最接近动力连接器针脚定义类。

classification.category_basis:

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。

仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框文字为'电气原理图'，在完整图中对应左下角电机电气连接示意区域，附近可见A+、A-、B+、B-等相线端子标识，表达电机动力绕组接线关系；在给定类别中最接近动力连接器或电源接口针脚/接线定义。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read as '1', corrected to visible terminal label 'A-'.
OCR read as '叶', corrected to visible rotated terminal label 'B+'.
OCR fragments 'B' and 'C' interpreted as the visible rotated terminal label 'B-'.

terminology_notes: A+, A-, B+, B- are connector or winding terminal labels, not dimensions.
M is a motor symbol label, not a dimensional callout.

dimension_records.reason: Visible electrical terminal label at the left of the winding diagram; not a dimensional value.
Large circled M is a motor symbol label, not a mechanical dimension.
OCR captured only a fragment, but the visible text position and context indicate the A- terminal label.
Rotated bottom-left terminal label in the winding diagram; OCR misread the characters.
Rotated bottom-right terminal label reconstructed from adjacent OCR fragments and terminal context.

engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Visible terminal labels include A+, A-, B+, and B-, with motor symbol M shown in the winding schematic.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No mechanical dimensions are present in this crop; several OCR boxes are discarded as coil or line-shape noise.

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
